title: Apply thinking-seam enforcement in pi-jit-agents
description: Apply the DEC-0002 decision: executeAgent enforces thinking=off when forced toolChoice is present, emits a warning naming the agent and the incompatibility.
acceptance_criteria: executeAgent inspects dispatch options for forced toolChoice
When forced toolChoice is present and compiled spec declares thinking: on, thinking is disabled and a warning is emitted via a structured diagnostic channel
Non-forced dispatches continue to honor the spec's thinking field
Unit test covers: forced-toolChoice + thinking:on (warning + thinking off), forced-toolChoice + thinking:off (no warning), free-form + thinking:on (thinking forwarded)

tasks.title: Add pre-dispatch check in executeAgent
tasks.acceptance: Pre-dispatch branch inspects toolChoice and compiled spec's thinking field; when incompatible, disables thinking and emits warning

tasks.title: Define structured diagnostic channel
tasks.description: Decide whether warnings emit via logger, alongside JitAgentResult, or both. Must be consumable by both pi-workflows (workflow steps) and pi-behavior-monitors (classify calls).
tasks.acceptance: JitAgentResult gains a diagnostics field or equivalent; both consumers can read it
